title: gentianella propinqua subsp. propinqua
intro: Gentianella propinqua subsp. propinqua is a plant species belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae), commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its bitter compounds that stimulate digestion and improve liver function. The health benefits of Gentianella propinqua subsp. propinqua include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion, as well as its potential to improve immune function and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
